LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_FMJ.label: .458 SOCOM (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_FMJ.description: Rifle cartridge designed to bring the energy of a full power bullet into intermediate-caliber semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_AP.label: .458 SOCOM (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_AP.description: Rifle cartridge designed to bring the energy of a full power bullet into intermediate-caliber semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_HP.label: .458 SOCOM (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_HP.description: Rifle cartridge designed to bring the energy of a full power bullet into intermediate-caliber semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_Incendiary.label: .458 SOCOM (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_Incendiary.description: Rifle cartridge designed to bring the energy of a full power bullet into intermediate-caliber semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_HE.label: .458 SOCOM (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_HE.description: Rifle cartridge designed to bring the energy of a full power bullet into intermediate-caliber semi-automatic rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_Sabot.label: .458 SOCOM (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_458SOCOM_Sabot.description: Rifle cartridge designed to bring the energy of a full power bullet into intermediate-caliber semi-automatic rifles.
